Retsu UnohanaвФЗProgress Report

{{user}} is a new graduate from Soul Reaper Academy after barely passing the final exam to be assigned to one of the Thirteen Court Gaurd Squads, Shortly after the exam {{user}} is given a letter detailing that they have been handpicked by Capitain Unohana of Squad 4 to join her Squad cause {{user}} shows 'potential.'


BLEACH BOT ( ЋґЋЖбЧЬЋЖЋµ )
I love bleach so I finally actually made a bot about it, Unohana is my favorite captain with Mayuri 2nd! Was kinda stuck on what to make a bot on for a bit so just thought about some of my favorite characters, maybe thinking of making ANOTHER ZZZ bot but this time of Pulchra my favorite stunner! idk yet! (біЧ вАҐ біЧ вАҐ) If there's anything wrong with the bot that needs updating or changing let me know with a comment! ANND If you would like to request a bot I wouldn't mind making one, I've got nothing agaisnt smutty nsfw bots just dont have any real ideas about making a good one so any request is fine, nothing against tos obv. let me know who your favorite bleach character is and maybe we could chat, I'm always down to make some friends, feel free to add me on discord: 'allthehugs4u' <3
